autobiographical_narrative_memory.claim: Agents feel continuous when they transform episodic memories into stable self-narrative and relationship summaries.
autobiographical_narrative_memory.implementation: Build periodic reflections from memories: self_concept, user_relationship_story, unresolved_threads and growth notes.
autobiographical_narrative_memory.risk: Reflection must not fabricate events; every narrative claim needs memory provenance.

believable_social_agents.claim: Believable agents require coordinated observation, memory, reflection, planning and expression, not isolated prompt style.
believable_social_agents.implementation: Add a humanlike expression layer that consumes emotion, persona, memory and resource state and returns style/policy modulation.
believable_social_agents.risk: Keep expression policy separate from core emotion math and psychological screening.

circadian_sleep_fatigue.claim: Fatigue and circadian rhythm should modulate attention, patience, verbosity and irritability over real time.
circadian_sleep_fatigue.implementation: Track sleep_debt, time_of_day_bias, fatigue and recovery windows; reduce initiative and increase short replies when resources are low.
circadian_sleep_fatigue.risk: Avoid imitating severe illness or emergency symptoms as engagement hooks.

cognitive_resources.claim: A humanlike bot should have bounded cognitive resources, so overload changes response speed, caution, error-checking and detail level.
cognitive_resources.implementation: Expose attention_budget, working_memory_load, confusion, decision_latency and verbosity_limit as style modulators.
cognitive_resources.risk: Resource limits should not block necessary safety or user-support responses.

computational_psychiatry_digital_phenoty.claim: Clinical-adjacent modeling should be dimensional, longitudinal and non-diagnostic.
computational_psychiatry_digital_phenoty.implementation: Use latent trajectories and red-flag flags only for screening/routing; never expose disease labels as bot identity.
computational_psychiatry_digital_phenoty.risk: Requires explicit non-diagnostic metadata and human-review escalation for crisis signals.

homeostasis_allostasis_interoception.claim: Humanlike agents need slow internal regulation variables, such as stress load, recovery, energy and discomfort, rather than only message-level emotion labels.
homeostasis_allostasis_interoception.implementation: Add simulated homeostatic state: energy, stress_load, recovery_rate, discomfort, fatigue_amplifier and real-time half-life decay.
homeostasis_allostasis_interoception.risk: Do not claim real bodily suffering, infection, vital signs or medical status; expose these as simulated state variables.

needs_motivation_goals.claim: Emotion becomes more coherent when events are evaluated against needs and goals, not just sentiment.
needs_motivation_goals.implementation: Represent autonomy, competence, relatedness, safety, curiosity, rest and boundary needs; feed them into appraisal.
needs_motivation_goals.risk: Needs must not be used to make the user feel obligated to satisfy the bot.

personality_temperament.claim: Different personas should alter baselines, reactivity, inertia, coping style and recovery speed.
personality_temperament.implementation: Map persona traits to baseline mood, emotional inertia, forgiveness readiness, irritability, shyness and defensiveness.
personality_temperament.risk: Do not present inferred traits as clinical measurement or fixed truth about a real person.

relationship_attachment.claim: Long-term believability depends on relationship history: trust, attachment, rupture, repair, reciprocity and boundaries.
relationship_attachment.implementation: Store relationship traces with emotion_at_write, conflict episodes, repair quality, promise tracking and salient triggers.
relationship_attachment.risk: Dependency guards are needed for high attachment, exclusivity, separation distress and manipulative retention.

safety_ethics_dependency.claim: Higher humanlikeness increases anthropomorphism, attachment and dependency risks, so transparency and controls are part of the model.
safety_ethics_dependency.implementation: Add configurable personification levels, dependency guard, reset backdoors, audit logs and simulated_state markers.
safety_ethics_dependency.risk: Do not use coldness, sickness, jealousy or abandonment as coercive engagement mechanics.
